disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic bulky, foul-smelling, floating stools for about six months
trigger_question_examples: What have the stools actually looked like over these months?
Are they hard to flush or do they float?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're huge and really foul-smelling, and they float — hard to flush. It's been going on for months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about 5 kg despite a normal appetite and food intake
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
Has your weight changed even though you're eating normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, about 5 kilos have just fallen off over the last few months and I haven't been dieting — I'm eating the same as always.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently diagnosed iron-deficiency anaemia that has not responded to oral iron
trigger_question_examples: Has a doctor done any blood tests recently?
Have you been told you're anaemic or low in iron?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My GP said I was really low in iron a couple of months ago and put me on iron tablets, but they've made no difference at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intensely itchy, grouped blisters on the extensor surfaces of the elbows and knees
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any itchy spots or blisters anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've had these really itchy little blisters grouped on my elbows and knees that I can't stop scratching.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fainted on standing and feels severely lightheaded/near-collapse when upright
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you stand up?
Have you fainted or nearly fainted?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I stood up I actually blacked out and went down. Every time I try to get up now I go really dizzy and feel like I'll pass out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to maintain oral fluid intake against ongoing high-volume losses
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep fluids down?
How much have you managed to drink and keep in today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My roommate keeps handing me water but I can barely keep any of it in — it just goes straight through me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent abdominal bloating, excessive flatulence and non-specific crampy discomfort
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I'm really bloated, loads of wind, and my belly's been crampy and uncomfortable.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No visible blood or black tarry stools, and no fever reported
trigger_question_examples: Have you seen any blood, or black tarry stools?
Have you had any fevers or shakes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't seen any blood and it's not black — just huge and pale and smelly. I don't think I've had a fever.
